name: The First National Bank And Trust Company Of Miami
description_short: Community-focused bank serving Miami and Ottawa County since 1900, offering personal banking, business solutions, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
The First National Bank & Trust Company of Miami is a community bank with over 120 years of history, established in 1900 and deeply rooted in Ottawa County. The bank emphasizes relationship-based banking and local community support as core to its mission. They position themselves as a trusted partner committed to understanding customers' unique financial needs rather than offering one-size-fits-all solutions.

FNB Miami offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including personal banking with tailored checking and savings products, business banking solutions designed for growth and sustainability, flexible loan options across various needs, online and mobile banking platforms for account management, and fraud protection education. Their routing number is 103101754, and they maintain physical branch locations throughout the Miami area alongside digital banking options. The bank actively markets its mobile app available on both Apple App Store and Google Play.

The bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized service and community investment. Rather than focusing on national reach or cutting-edge fintech features, FNB Miami highlights its legacy of local support, commitment to understanding individual customer circumstances, and tailored financial solutions. They also demonstrate commitment to customer education with dedicated content about fraud prevention and online banking safety.

As a traditional community bank, FNB Miami serves customers who value local relationships and personalized service over digital-first banking experiences. However, the website content focuses heavily on marketing language and values rather than specific product details, rates, or fee structures. Prospective customers should contact branches directly or visit in person for concrete information about account terms, interest rates, loan products, and minimum balance requirements. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Account management tools for budget tracking and spending monitoring
In-person branch banking at multiple locations
Scam prevention guidance and customer education
pros: Over 120-year history and established community presence since 1900
Personalized banking solutions tailored to individual customer needs rather than standardized products
Comprehensive service offerings including personal banking, business banking, loans, and digital platforms
Mobile app availability on both Apple App Store and Google Play for convenient account management
Dedicated fraud prevention and customer security education resources
Local focus on Ottawa County community growth and development
Multiple physical branch locations for in-person banking needs
cons: Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APRs, fees, or minimum balance requirements
No details provided about loan products, terms, or qualification criteria
Limited transparency regarding business banking services and capabilities
No mention of deposit insurance (FDIC) confirmation or guarantees
Community bank status may mean limited geographic accessibility compared to national banks
best_for: Miami and Ottawa County residents seeking personalized relationship-based banking
Small business owners looking for tailored financial services and local business lending
Customers who prefer in-person banking relationships over purely digital experiences
Community-minded individuals who want to support local financial institutions
diagnosis: FNB Miami is best suited for customers in the Miami and Ottawa County area who value personalized service, community connection, and local banking relationships. The primary caveat is that the website provides limited concrete product details, so prospective customers must contact branches directly to evaluate specific rates, fees, and loan products against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
